subject: Sociology
title: Digital Divide in Education
description: One-minute skill: Digital Divide in Education.

hook.text: During the pandemic, some kids had laptops and Wi-Fi. Others had nothing. The digital divide went viral.

buildup.text: The digital divide is unequal access to technology, internet, and the skills to use them for learning.

discovery.text: Remote learning exposed what was always true: technology access mirrors existing class and racial divides.

twist.text: Giving devices isn't enough. Digital literacy, support, and quiet space to study at home matter just as much.

climax.text: Technology promised to democratize education. Without equity, it just added another layer of advantage.

quiz.question: What did the pandemic reveal about the digital divide?
options: Technology access mirrors existing class and racial divides
